revision.text:

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hibara Shrine
| native_name = 檜原神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hibara Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.538354|135.854669}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hibara Shrine'''|檜原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Kokushi genzaisha|lt=kokushi genzaisha|en|Kokushi genzaisha|fr|Kokushi genzaisha|ja|国史見在社|simple|Kokushi genzaisha|qid=Q118304363|1=Kokushi genzaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q135009157|ltq=Q135009157|qid=Q135009157|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}
** Series ordinal: 121
** P155: {{ill|Q11597229|ltq=Q11597229|qid=Q11597229|1=Anashi-Nimasu Hyōzu Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Wosata- Shrine|lt=Wosata- Shrine|qid=Q135038991|1=Wosata- Shrine}}
